ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the district is located */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date the district was created */,
  "redistricted" TEXT /* Date the district was last redistricted */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district (based on latest census data) */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the district (in square miles) */,
  "boundary_description" TEXT /* Description of the district boundary (e.g., counties, cities) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the representative */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party affiliation of the representative */,
  "district_residence" TEXT /* City or town where the representative resided */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the representative */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the representative */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notable events or circumstances surrounding the representative's term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representatives_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative who served the term */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district where the representative served */,
  "took_office" TEXT /* Date the representative took office */,
  "left_office" TEXT /* Date the representative left office */,
  "reason_left_office" TEXT /* Reason for leaving office (e.g., retirement, death, scandal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terms_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terms_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES representatives ("representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the party was founded */,
  "dissolution_date" TEXT /* Date the party was dissolved (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code for the state (e.g., TX, CA) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state (based on latest census data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district affected by the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change took effect */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change (e.g., redistricting, reapportionment) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change (e.g., population growth, court order) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_changes_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, contributor) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the contribution */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district affected by the contribution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution (e.g., new information, correction) */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., data, edit, comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gis_data" (
  "gis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GIS entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district associated with the GIS data */,
  "boundary_data" TEXT /* GIS data about the district boundary (e.g., shapefile, GeoJSON) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the GIS data (e.g., US Census Bureau, state government) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gis_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district where the election was held */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date the election was held */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner of the election */,
  "winner_party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party affiliation of the winner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES representatives ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_winner_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)
